top_signals.title: Anthropic Says Alibaba ‘Illicitly’ Accessing AI Model
top_signals.summary: Anthropic PBC accused Alibaba Group Holding Ltd. of waging a large-scale effort to “illicitly” access its Claude artificial intelligence model using thousands of fraudulent accounts. Bloomberg's Maggie Eastland has the latest. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Philippines fears China may move to seize full control of disputed atoll - Financial Times
top_signals.summary: Philippines fears China may move to seize full control of disputed atoll  Financial Times
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Superstate co-founder raises $3.6 million pre-seed for Ground to help fintechs access onchain yield
top_signals.summary: Ground has raised $3.6 million in a pre-seed funding round co-led by Bain Capital Crypto and ParaFi as it emerges from stealth.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: SK Hynix Jumps 12% as US Listing Plan Boosts Valuation Hopes
top_signals.summary: SK Hynix Inc. shares surged after the memory chipmaker unveiled its plan for a $29 billion US listing, a move that analysts viewed as boosting valuations through capacity expansion and greater foreign investor access.

top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Japan unveils $2.3 trillion investment plan for next 14 years
top_signals.summary: The roadmap marks a key step in Takaichi's effort to put her stamp on Japan's growth strategy as technological change and geopolitical tensions reshape economic priorities.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
